items.title: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
items.summary: We’ve raised Claude’s usage limits and agreed a new compute partnership with SpaceX that will substantially increase our capacity in the near term.

items.title: Agents for financial services and insurance
items.summary: We’re releasing ten new Cowork and Claude Code plugins, integrations with the Microsoft 365 suite, new connectors, and an MCP app for financial services and insurance organizations.

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026
items.summary: Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.

items.title: Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
